title: AMA with @squidrouter and @hyperliquidx
summary_title: Hyperliquid, Squid, and Axelar: Cross-chain perps in 20 seconds
summary_description: Jeff, Fig, and Zuli discuss Hyperliquid's L1, Squid's cross-chain integration, and the liquidator vault strategy.

key_moments.label: Zuli intro: multi-chain maxi building on Axelar, helping Hyperliquid
Fig: Squid co-founder, musician-turned-developer, cross-chain swap layer
Jeff: Market-making background, realized need for custom L1, building Hyperliquid
Why Hyperliquid chose custom L1 over Arbitrum: performance requirements
Squid integration: one-click onboarding from any chain to Hyperliquid
Referral rewards program live: USDC distribution based on trading volume
Vaults renamed from pools: liquidation, market-making, and copy-trading strategies
API trading: Python SDK for quant traders, first dex with end-to-end example

pull_quote: If you want to be certain on the price, you can be uncertain on execution
